segments.text: It's probably the hardest it's ever been. We need to guard our creativity,
our attention with the most valuable currency that we have. Why is prioritization important? Well, number one is because we are living in an age
or in an era of excess information. Your attention is being pulled in all different directions. Especially with social media, it is extremely hard to
let alone concentrate on one task. And prioritizing different tasks becomes even harder. And it's probably the hardest it's ever been because what you
pay attention to now will decide what your life looks like in the next few years.
